name: Homemade Lemon Pie Filling Mix
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups sugar, or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the lemonade powder, cornstarch (1 cup + 2 tablespoons), sugar, and salt.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
3. Transfer the mixture to a 1-quart airtight container.
4. Label the container with the date and contents.
5. Store in a cool, dry place.
6. Use within 4-6 months.
Makes about 4 1/4 cups of Homemade Lemon Pie Filling.
